summary: Tested SHEIN-style order management app (Spanish, MXN). All 9 backend API tests PASS (health, seed, months CRUD, orders CRUD, notes with discount math, abonos partial/full payments, cascading delete, global summary, 404 cases). Frontend E2E covers full navigation Home->Month->Order->Note->Abonos and verified key calculations (1000 * 0.85 = 850, full abono -> balance 0 + Pagado badge, abono delete restores balance). Backend arithmetic: ganancia = cobrado - cost confirmed. Data consistency between backend and UI confirmed (e.g., summary ganancia -$1,874.50 reflects changes).

minor.issue: Does not return 404 when month does not exist (always returns ok:true). Same for DELETE /api/orders and DELETE /api/notes - silent no-op when id missing. Consider returning 404 for correctness.
No verification that abono_id exists; silently succeeds even for invalid id.

design_issues.screen: New note dialog / Confirm delete dialog
issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby / Description (accessibility warnings in console).

action_items: Optional: Add Description/aria-describedby to Dialog/AlertDialog components to resolve a11y console warnings.
Optional: Return 404 on delete endpoints when target does not exist (currently silent no-op).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py compute_month_summary calls compute_order_summary per order which triggers one notes query per order (N+1). For a month with many orders this may become slow; consider batch aggregation.
list_months loops compute_month_summary -> compute_order_summary -> notes fetch per order (N+M queries). Acceptable for current scale but worth noting.
POST /api/months silently upserts (returns existing if year/month duplicates) without a 2xx distinction; frontend cannot distinguish create vs already-existing.
Frontend OrderDetail.jsx is 524 lines; close to the >700 threshold. Consider splitting edit/new-note dialogs into smaller components once it grows.
No input validation bounds: subtotal, cost, discount_pct accept negative or >100 values. Backend should guard discount_pct in [0,100] and non-negative amounts.
seed_data_creation: Used existing /api/seed (idempotent). Seed contains 2 months, 3 orders, 7 client notes with abonos as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_shein_api.py is authoritative; re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_shein_api.py -v. Frontend: mobile viewport 420x900. Key testids all present. 'Otro %' button must be clicked before filling note-discount-custom input; preset select with data-testid=note-discount-select is default.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Minor cleanup test step failed with a non-reproduction navigation error ('list index out of range' after extra navigation); core functional assertions all passed before that.
